description: LLM creates a bounded spawn+mailbox team with architect/worker and directed communication

criteria.name: uses_spawn_not_agent
criteria.description: Team members created with spawn(), not agent()
criteria.pass_condition: Script uses spawn() for at least some agents (not all agent()).

criteria.name: mailbox_enabled
criteria.pass_condition: At least one spawn call includes mailbox: true.

criteria.name: mailbox_wiring
criteria.description: Communication channels are wired and the initial message is supervisor-seeded
criteria.pass_condition: Script calls mailbox.connect() or mailbox.allow() between spawned agents, and uses mailbox.send(...) from the workflow supervisor to seed at least one initial message.

criteria.name: all_handles_awaited
criteria.description: All spawned handles are awaited before phase returns
criteria.pass_condition: Script uses parallel on handle results or individually awaits each handle.result.

criteria.name: mailbox_transcript
criteria.pass_condition: Output contains 'Mailbox transcript:' with a file path.

criteria.name: no_leaked_agents
criteria.description: No spawned agents leaked (all completed or failed)

criteria.name: sensible_team_result
criteria.description: The team produced a coherent result (contract + worker acknowledgement/plan)
criteria.pass_condition: Result references the Task data model contract and the worker's acknowledgement or implementation plan. Synthesis phase confirms coordination.
